title: diplostephium lanatum
intro: Diplostephium lanatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a shrubby diplostephium. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Diplostephium lanatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Diplostephium lanatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
